spacing_and_layout.philosophy: Generous spacing, oversized touch targets for mobile accessibility. Low-literacy friendly.
spacing_and_layout.grid_system: Bento Grid Mode B (Control Room) adapted for mobile-first stacking. 1 col on mobile, 3-4 cols on desktop.

components.cards: Civic-Poster style: rounded-xl, 2px solid #0F172A border, solid flat shadow shadow-[4px_4px_0_0_#0F172A]. Background white.
components.buttons: Large text, rounded-xl, 2px solid #0F172A border, solid flat shadow. Active state: translate-y-1 translate-x-1 shadow-none transition-all.
components.inputs: Shadcn components heavily modified: h-14, text-lg, 2px border #0F172A, rounded-lg. Huge touch areas.
components.icons: lucide-react, size w-8 h-8 to w-12 h-12 depending on context. No emojis. Thick stroke-width (2.5 to 3).
components.navigation: Thick top header with solid background and bottom border (border-b-2 border-slate-900). Mobile bottom nav strongly recommended for accessibility.

accessibility_and_testing.contrast: APCA compliant. Text is mostly near-black (#0F172A) on off-white (#FDFBF7) or high-contrast white on primary colors.
accessibility_and_testing.test_ids: MANDATORY: All interactive elements must have data-testid (e.g., data-testid='report-submit-button').
accessibility_and_testing.motion: Minimal. Snappy state changes. Focus rings must be 2px offset #0F172A.

hero_background.description: Joyful Indian children gathering around a manual water pump. Use for the main landing page hero to evoke community and hope.

feature_water.description: Villagers gathering water. Use for the 'Report Water' category or educational section.

feature_community.description: Indian woman carrying metal pots. Use to illustrate the community impact or user dashboard.

rewards_coins.description: Stack of coins for the Gamification/Rewards section.

media.image_overlays: If text is placed over images, use a solid color card wrapper behind the text instead of a full screen gradient overlay. This ensures maximum readability for low-literacy users.

instructions_to_main_agent: Install `lucide-react` for icons and `recharts` for the conservation charts.
Use pure Tailwind for the marketing/landing page with bold 'civic-poster' borders (border-2 border-slate-900 shadow-[4px_4px_0_0_#0F172A]).
Use Shadcn UI for the dashboard, auth, and admin views, but customize them heavily to match the civic-poster aesthetic (remove default soft shadows, replace with flat solid shadows, thicken borders).
Implement the IVR Simulator as a highly visual, interactive card mimicking a retro phone dial pad.
For the multilingual AI assistant chat panel, prioritize extremely clear typography and a prominent microphone icon button for voice input.
Ensure the application is fully responsive, prioritizing mobile-first rendering.
Add `data-testid` to EVERY button, input, tab, and actionable element.
Import and configure 'Outfit' font for headings and 'Manrope' for body text via Google Fonts in your index.html or global css. Do NOT use Inter.
Avoid typical generic SaaS aesthetics; make it feel grounded, local, and tactical.
